subcategory: AI Chat Interface with Model Selector
use_cases: AI-powered chat interfaces for developer tools and coding assistants
Multi-model AI chat with selectable providers like Claude, GPT, and Gemini
Conversational interfaces supporting file, code, and image attachments
Modern chat input components with glass-morphism styling for SaaS products
Interactive model selection dropdowns for AI platform frontends
ai_summary: A modern AI chat interface component featuring a model selector dropdown for switching between AI providers (Sonnet, Opus, Haiku, GPT-4o, Gemini), attachment support for files/images/code, and glass-morphism styling with gradient accents. Built as a composite component with Tailwind CSS, it provides an interactive chat input experience optimized for developer tools, SaaS platforms, and AI assistant applications with hover effects and keyboard navigation support.
